name: Greek Pork Pita Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork loin into thin strips. Combine olive oil, lemon juice, mustard, garlic, and oregano.
2. Pour mixture over pork. Refrigerate 1-8 hours, stirring occasionally. Stir together yogurt, cucumber, garlic, and dill weed. Cover and refrigerate.
3. Remove pork from marinade. Stir-fry in non-stick pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes until cooked through.
4. Halve two pita loaves and open to form a pocket. Fill with pork.
5. Top with cucumber mixture. Garnish with chopped red onion.
